channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Tree has fallen in road due to weather, blocking half the road., 24th March
item.description:
Called into Bromley OOH - Tree has fallen in road due to weather, blocking half the road. Outside 12 Ash Grove, SE20 7RD
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ash Grove, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous Overhanging Tree, 24th March
item.description:
The tree in the back garden of 44 Bromley Road (I believe council owned) is significantly over hanging on the driveway of 49 Manor Road and the wider pavement and road of Manor Road. There is often significant debris (big branches) which will at some point cause an incident, damage a car or a person - if not addressed urgently.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Manor Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped clothes, 24th March
item.description:
Dumped clothes and rubbish in alley between oakhapton and budleigh crescent

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Budleigh Crescent, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Carlton Vale NW6 5PX, 24th March
item.description:
Damaged leaning Street speed sign post at junction of Carlton Vale & Malvern Road NW6 5PX opposite Regal Court blocknof flats & Kilburn Park Street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Malvern Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog poo seaton rd, 24th March
item.description:
Bag of dog poo on seaton road end meeting exmouth road behind yellow salt box. People often leave bags of poo here.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Seaton Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Light takes too long, 24th March
item.description:
It takes for every for this light to go green for pedestrians crossing.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Long Road, Clapham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog poo exmouth road, 24th March
item.description:
Dog poo both sides of the pavement on exmouth road near oakhampton crescent
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Exmouth Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hillsgrove primary alley entrance rubbish everywhere, 24th March
item.description:
Rubbish along entire length of alley and bag of poo right near the school entrance

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sidmouth Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, flytipping, broken suitcase, 24th March
item.description:
Rubbish, flytipping, broken suitcase, etc ..... located under trees bushes on green verge opposite site to Englefield Cres house number 8
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9-23, Englefield Crescent, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Toilet by bins, 24th March
item.description:
Toilet by bins

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Whiston Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large tree has fallen in road, 24th March
item.description:
Called into Bromley OOH - Large tree has fallen in road due to weather, road is blocked. Right outside 66 Crystal Palace Park Road, SE26 6UN.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crystal Palace Park Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish and broken glass on stairs, 24th March
item.description:
Rubbish and broken glass on flight of stairs, Tillingbourne Grn, next to house number 18
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Tillingbourne Green, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement defect, 24th March
item.description:
There is a significant pavement defect (a relatively deep hole) in front of the building. This has created a dangerous trip hazard for pedestrians. Due to the lack of action and to prevent people from falling or injuring themselves, a large plant pot has been placed over the hole to make it visible. However, this is only a temporary measure and is now obstructing the footway. This issue has been present for over two weeks and requires urgent inspection and repair to ensure public safety.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lavender Hill, Clapham Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of rubbish being blown by the wind, 24th March
item.description:
Lots of rubbish being blown around by the wind.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Upper Elmers End Road, Eden Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drop kerb damage continuing to worsen outside #42, 24th March
item.description:
This damage was reported in 2024, and more recently in January 2026, it continues to get worse. This needs sorting asap as the condition of concrete hard standing (and surrounding paving slabs) are now poor. The dropped kerb area is in greatest need of attention first.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 44, Gloucester Avenue, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead animal in the road, 24th March
item.description:
Dead animal in the road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Avenue, West Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household rubbish dumped over fence opposite 59 Sewell Road SE2 9XP, 24th March
item.description:
The tenants at 59 Sewell Road SE2 9XP have dumped lots of household rubbish over fence opposite their property. It is a repeated problem which the Council keep clearing and they repeatedly dump their rubbish over there
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sewell Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Many potholes, 24th March
item.description:
Extensive potholes across road where Bishops avenue meets Canons Close. Have been there for at least 4 weeks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 58, The Bishops Avenue, Hampstead Garden Suburb, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Border between Grove End Lodge and Denyer House, 24th March
item.description:
There have always been 2 bollards. One, the one that is standing now and another one, between the existing one and the external gate of Grove End Lodge / Denyer House. In 2022 this one was removed, creating a "motorway" for electric bikes, scooters and other fast travelling vehicles that continue from Denyer House, on the public footpath, towards Chetwynd road. They go very fast and this has cause a few near miss. Urgent action is required to reinnstate the old bollard.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): College Lane, Dartmouth Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Massive Potholes on this road, 24th March
item.description:
This road is extremely badly damaged, and no attempt has been made to resurface it, despite being damaged for years. It will really destroy people’s vehicles, and then you still have to pay road tax/council tax. Where is the money going?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): East Dulwich Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
